emails.subject: FW: NICOR
emails.body: Chuck, Do you know the figures to give to Phillip? I wasn't sure if Lisa filled you in on any of this before she left.

emails.subject: RE: NICOR
emails.body: In a word NO!! Can you clue me in on what you need? I have Lisa's email address and phone number if you don't think we can find it...

emails.subject: RE: NICOR
emails.body: You might want to call her and see if she can tell you anything. I was assuming this was the totals still sitting on the ledger, but maybe not all of it. Let me know if you can't reach her.
